{% extends "!layout.html" %} {% block extrahead %} {% endblock %} {# Re-implement the theme's sidebar header so the documented AAPS version is always shown under the icon/title. sphinx_rtd_theme 3.0 dropped the static version div, showing it only via the (here disabled) RTD flyout. The value comes from `version` in shared.conf.py (single source of truth). #} {%- block sidebartitle %} {%- set _logo_url = logo_url|default(pathto('_static/' + (logo or ""), 1)) %} {%- set _root_doc = root_doc|default(master_doc) %} {% if not theme_logo_only %}{{ project }}{% endif %} {%- if logo or logo_url %} {%- endif %} {%- if version %}
{{ _('Version') }} {{ version }}
{%- endif %} {%- if READTHEDOCS or DEBUG %} {%- if theme_version_selector or theme_language_selector %}
{%- endif %} {%- endif %} {%- include "searchbox.html" %} {%- endblock %}
